message.content:
Our investigation has confirmed that an unauthorized third party accessed a subset of data from our systems. That data included certain account-related information necessary to provide and support our services.

We do not store passwords in a form that is designed to be directly readable as ordinary text. Our systems employ industry-standard mechanisms intended to protect authentication data in the event of an incident, and we are continuing to review and enhance those controls.

Out of an abundance of caution, we have taken proactive security measures, including prompting or requiring password resets for affected accounts and increasing monitoring for unusual login activity. We are also working with independent security experts and relevant authorities to ensure that we address this incident as thoroughly as possible.

We encourage all users—whether or not they have been contacted by us directly—to update their passwords regularly and to avoid reusing the same password across multiple services.
